tweets.text: Happy Easter! May your holiday be full of hope, joy, and renewal. https://t.co/dNhat1I2mV

By expanding the @NATO Alliance, we have fortified the shield against aggression and brought more people under its protection. So that together we can focus on the real work of delivering for our people. https://t.co/sRv7HQRnoV
Ukraine stands for values we all share: democracy, self-determination, freedom. We are #UnitedwithUkraine. https://t.co/hhngm3mFxq
Support for Ukraine is not just from the United States, it’s from country after country in Europe and well beyond. https://t.co/cXN8tAPg7n

Women’s contributions helped turn the tide of World War II, including women serving as Codebreakers. We’re only just starting to learn about their stories, because for 70 years, their contributions remained classified. @HistoryatState details this untold chapter of history. https://t.co/dCg1YRl8xX

Girls often grow up disadvantaged simply because of their gender. Learn how this year's International Women of Courage are working to change that and advance progress in their communities around the world. https://t.co/yJH44erBq7

A major military ground operation in Rafah risks killing more civilians. It risks wreaking greater havoc with the provision of humanitarian assistance. It risks further isolating Israel around the world and jeopardizing its long term security and standing. https://t.co/2OM7Kbbmdy
The people who live in Gaza continue to face a horrific humanitarian situation. Humanitarian assistance must be a priority and it must be sustained. https://t.co/uZaZecoB6X

.@SecBlinken met with Arab leaders while in Cairo and there was clear consensus on the need for:

• An immediate, sustained ceasefire with release of hostages

• Increased, sustained humanitarian assistance for the people of Gaza

• Long-term peace and security in the region https://t.co/fDcvBqpBHz
The more that we can help people break the cycle of use and dependence, the smaller the illicit market for drugs. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/RPRWCJad26

.@SecBlinken will travel to France and Belgium next week to underscore our commitment to the NATO Alliance, strengthen transatlantic partnerships, and address global challenges. https://t.co/EIoGlyHRHr

Synthetic drugs devastate communities across the United States and around the world. Synthetic drug use, dependence, and overdose deaths are on the rise globally. And there is only one way to address this crisis that affects every region in the world: together. https://t.co/apljNSiH8E
If we want to change the trajectory of this crisis, there is only one way to succeed, and that’s together. - @SecBlinken on addressing the threats posed by synthetic drugs https://t.co/KARAqo4mbE

This year during #IWOC2024 we honor Nicaraguan activists who continue to fight for democracy with the Madeleine Albright Honorary Group Award for their courage to continue to fight for democracy and human rights under a repressive regime. https://t.co/UJmUGLqYxj

The U.S. and Central America partners are working to address the root causes of migration. @VP met with Guatemala’s President Arévalo to recognize the positive impact of our efforts, which includes creating good jobs, responsive governance, and investments in local communities. https://t.co/Tmxt72FUdY

Around the world, more people are on the move than at any time in recorded history. When it comes to irregular migration, we have to meet this together – not only among Mexico, Guatemala, and the U.S., but all the countries in the region. https://t.co/T59cd3Qbxq
The Festival of Colors marks the beginning of a season of hope and new growth. Happy Holi to everyone who is celebrating! https://t.co/XKk9JDGSi0

@SecBlinken @FLOTUS Agather Atuhaire is a renowned journalist, lawyer, and social justice activist in Uganda. She is being honored as an #IWOC for bravely reporting on sexual harassment in the NGO sector, threats to democracy and governance, and abuse of process and excess. https://t.co/qadZwMDE8n

This week at State, @SecBlinken traveled to the Republic of Korea, the Philippines, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, and Israel. He attended the #SummitForDemocracy, underscored the strong U.S.-Philippines alliance, and continued work towards lasting peace and security in the Middle East. https://t.co/QXeBQ9qfs7
.@SecBlinken details how the U.S. is attacking the synthetic drug crisis that has hit every region in the world. "There is only one way to succeed: together." https://t.co/5UYnjELriE

@SecBlinken @FLOTUS Rabha El Haymar used the law to get Morocco to recognize her traditional marriage, sparing her daughter a life of stigma as the child of a single mother. A documentary featuring Haymar raises awareness about the plight of single mothers and Moroccan family laws. #IWOC https://t.co/i3CrXboU3u

The cherry blossoms have reached peak bloom here in our nation’s capital. These gifts from Japan are an enduring symbol of the friendship shared between our two countries — and have become one of our most popular attractions.  🇺🇸🌸🇯🇵 https://t.co/T8D614U9p5

A major military ground operation in Rafah risks killing more civilians. It risks wreaking greater havoc with the provision of humanitarian assistance. It risks further isolating Israel around the world and jeopardizing its long term security and standing. https://t.co/bYfTqJMUCv

Rina Gonoi of Japan resigned from the Japan Self-Defense Force and launched a public campaign to expose sexual harassment, prompting other abuse survivors to share their stories. The JSDF is now building a more secure workplace so everyone can defend Japan with dignity. #IWOC https://t.co/KCTyADZxAk

We share Israel’s goal of defeating Hamas, which is responsible for the worst massacre of the Jewish people since the Holocaust. As we’ve said, though, a major military ground operation in Rafah is not the way to do it. — @SecBlinken https://t.co/cVzC1bJePP

Almost 2 billion people do not have access to water that is safe to drink. Under the U.S. Global Water Strategy, we are working to advance our vision for a water-secure world, helping tens of millions gain access to clean water and sanitation. #WorldWaterDay https://t.co/tx5tRmX1Tx

Fariba Balouch, a London-based Iranian human rights activist from Iran, is being honored as an #IWOC for highlighting the Iranian regime’s gender, ethnicity, and sect-based discrimination. She continues her activism, despite threats from Iranian authorities. https://t.co/jMliDnAfbV
The ceasefire that we’re working on would be the best, most immediate way to enable us to surge humanitarian assistance. — @SecBlinken on increasing aid deliveries to Gaza. https://t.co/fY6hdruPnz

Fatou Baldeh, a survivor of female genital mutilation and cutting from The Gambia, documented women's experiences during the Jammeh dictatorship, including murder and rape. She saved her young niece from mutilation, breaking the cycle in her own family. #IWOC https://t.co/tNBojZ55Qn
.@POTUS on the United States leading international efforts to get more humanitarian assistance into Gaza: “Protecting and saving innocent lives has to be a priority.” https://t.co/6AK5loxh5y

We are working to bring all the hostages home, to ease the humanitarian crisis, and to end the terror threat and to bring peace to Gaza and Israel — an enduring peace with a two-state solution for two peoples. https://t.co/1A34qFTRlW

We come from nations large and small, East and West, developed and developing economies. But we’re all united by a fierce conviction: that democracy is the single most powerful tool for unleashing human potential and delivering results for our people. – @SecBlinken https://t.co/0VBiqq7epz

Fátima Corozo of Ecuador is being honored as an #IWOC for putting her life on the line to design and implement youth development programs. These programs provide safe alternatives for young people in Esmeraldas, one of the world’s most violent cities. https://t.co/VBhahgMufk
Happy Nowruz. Warm wishes for a new year filled with joy, prosperity, and countless blessings. https://t.co/OXMnsdci3W

We continue to face a horrific humanitarian situation for children, for women, and for men in Gaza. Humanitarian assistance must be a priority and it must be sustained. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/7XyVhaBHMP

People-to-people ties are at the core of the U.S.-Philippine partnership. Today in Manila, @‌SecBlinken will tour a semiconductor factory that's creating local and American jobs, meet with @YSEALI alumni, and underscore our ironclad commitment to the U.S.-Philippine alliance. https://t.co/sBZDJ0z8d4

Our democracies have different histories, different strengths, different challenges. But we’re all determined to deliver a safer, healthier, more prosperous, more inclusive future for our people and for people around the world. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/pH3PSmfO9k

If we can harness all of the extraordinary potential in artificial intelligence, while mitigating the downsides, we will advance progress for people around the world. – @SecBlinken https://t.co/sdM40YLrYa

Americans of every background celebrate #StPatricksDay, the feast day for Ireland’s patron saint. Today more than 30 million Americans claim Irish heritage, including @POTUS. Learn about Irish Americans who made significant contributions to the U.S.:
Happy #StPatricksDay! Today, we celebrate the deep connection, friendship and history between the Irish people and the United States. https://t.co/48XK4irsBd
